data.title: [Cleanup] Hidden-route data reconciliation: HIDDEN_HOUSE_IDS vs Navbar.sectionLinks vs OctahedronHero face-map should agree (FRAC-161 follow-up)

data.to:
**[CRITICAL CLEANUP — FRAC-161 follow-up]**

Per FRAC-21 §C3: hidden-route data disagrees across three locations.

## Inconsistencies
- `src/data/houses.ts:296-303` `HIDDEN_HOUSE_IDS` hides `forum` from banner UI
- `src/components/layout/Navbar.tsx:18-23` hides `Political Club` (=forum) AND `People` from the navbar
- `src/components/layout/Navbar.tsx:7-16` `sectionLinks` STILL INCLUDES Political Club and People (with colors)
- `src/components/three/OctahedronHero.tsx:388-397` face map STILL INCLUDES forum/people faces

## Action

Pick one source of truth (recommended: `src/data/houses.ts` — extend `HIDDEN_HOUSE_IDS` to a richer model that captures *where* a house is hidden: `{ id, hideFromNavbar, hideFromBanners, hideFromOctahedronFaces }`). All visual layers derive their hide logic from this single model.

## Acceptance criteria

- Single source of truth in `src/data/houses.ts`
- Navbar, HouseBanner, OctahedronHero all derive hide-state from the data model
- `forum` and `people` consistently hidden everywhere except where intentionally shown (octahedron faces, if those are kept)
- No regression to FRAC-161 (Political Club stays hidden from hero nav)

## Cites
FRAC-21 synthesis §C3; FRAC-161

data.body: Review (orchestrator, fresh context): clean refactor. New House flags (hideFromNavbar/hideFromBanners/hideFromOctahedronFaces) + 2 new derived exports (NAVBAR_VISIBLE_HOUSES, NAVBAR_HIDDEN_ROUTES). HIDDEN_HOUSE_IDS retired; VISIBLE_HOUSES semantic preserved for HouseBannerGrid. Navbar EXTRA_HIDDEN_HREFS retained for /people (no House entry). OctahedronHero untouched per plan (its hide signal = absence in FACE_BANNER_IMAGES). Build + typecheck + tests pass. Branch frac-32-hidden-routes-sot. **Merge note:** intersects FRAC-24 on houses.ts — resolution easy since FRAC-24 will add palette pairs to the same struct.
